steps.title: Identify the initial amount
steps.content: At the start of the observation, $t=0$, there are $66{,}000$ bacteria. This is the initial value.

steps.title: Use the doubling factor
steps.content:
The population doubles every hour, so the growth factor is $2$ for each hour $t$. The model is
$$
y=66{,}000(2)^t
$$

steps.title: Match the model
steps.content: The expression with initial value $66{,}000$ and hourly factor $2$ is $y=66{,}000(2)^t$. The answer is D.
